# Citizens Vision — Product Vision

## Mission
Empower organisations to see the relationship between their declared vision and their recorded activities — turning scattered data into strategic clarity.

## Core Value Proposition
Most organisations track activities in spreadsheets and measure success by gut feel. Citizens Vision computes the actual alignment between what an org says it values (vision + goals) and what it actually does (activities + events), surfaced through maps, dashboards, and timelines.

## Design Principles

### 1. Intelligence, Not Just Information
Raw data is visible in Citizens Connect. Citizens Vision transforms that data into insight — alignment scores, trend analysis, impact metrics, and actionable advisories.

### 2. Hierarchical by Nature
Organisations are hierarchical (org → department → project → activity). The system models this naturally, enabling rollup metrics and drill-down analysis at every level.

### 3. Multi-Tenant First
Every data model, query, and UI element is scoped to an organisation. Cross-org features are explicitly federated, never implicit.

### 4. Ecosystem Citizen
Citizens Vision is part of the Citizens ecosystem alongside Citizens Connect. It consumes CC data, enriches it with organisational context, and can expose intelligence back. Shared auth, shared design language, complementary capabilities.

### 5. Deterministic & Auditable
Metric computations and advisory outputs are rule-based and reproducible. Users trust the system because they can understand and verify how scores are calculated.

## Visual Identity
- Monochrome foundation: 60% white, 30% black (#111)
- Gold accent: 10% (#c8a24f / #D4AF37) — inherited from Citizens Connect
- No emoji in UI — SVG icons only
- Data-dense but clean layouts
- Dashboard panels with consistent metric card design
